category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps and split-system air conditioners exported from China to Chile

title.en: China-to-Chile Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入智利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入智利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Chile's SEC mandatory product approval (Sello SEC), CNE energy labelling and MEPS obligations, MMA refrigerant and ODS controls, and INN-adopted NCh/IEC safety standards for heat pumps and air conditioners.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与智利SEC强制产品认证（SEC印章）、CNE能效标签及最低能效标准（MEPS）、MMA制冷剂和消耗臭氧层物质管制，以及INN采用的NCh/IEC热泵和空调安全标准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與智利SEC強制產品認證（SEC印章）、CNE能效標籤及最低能效標準（MEPS）、MMA製冷劑和消耗臭氧層物質管制，以及INN採用的NCh/IEC熱泵和空調安全標準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, SEC registration filing, CNE energy label approval, MMA ODS permit, conformity assessment body decision, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current SEC mandatory product scope, Sello SEC marking requirements, CNE energy label and MEPS thresholds, MMA refrigerant controls, NCh standard editions, and local representative obligations with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation in Chile.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、SEC注册申报、CNE能效标签批准、MMA消耗臭氧层物质许可、符合性评定机构决定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在向智利出货、销售或安装前应与合格专业人士核验现行SEC强制产品范围、SEC印章标识要求、CNE能效标签及MEPS门槛、MMA制冷剂管制、NCh标准版本及当地代表义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、SEC註冊申報、CNE能效標籤批准、MMA消耗臭氧層物質許可、符合性評定機構決定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在向智利出貨、銷售或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗現行SEC強制產品範圍、SEC印章標識要求、CNE能效標籤及MEPS門檻、MMA製冷劑管制、NCh標準版本及當地代表義務。

answer_first.en: SEC mandatory product approval (Sello SEC), CNE mandatory energy label and MEPS star-rating compliance, MMA refrigerant and ODS permit obligations (R-22 phasedown), and re-testing or documentation alignment to NCh/IEC 60335-2-40 are the major Chile compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps. Grid compatibility is excellent — Chile operates at 220 V 50 Hz, identical to China. CCC is not recognised by Chilean authorities.
answer_first.zh: SEC强制产品认证（SEC印章）、CNE强制能效标签及MEPS星级合规、MMA制冷剂和消耗臭氧层物质许可义务（R-22逐步淘汰），以及按NCh/IEC 60335-2-40重新测试或调整文件，是中国空气源热泵进入智利的主要合规差距。电网兼容性极佳——智利采用220 V 50 Hz，与中国相同。CCC不被智利当局认可。
answer_first.zht: SEC強制產品認證（SEC印章）、CNE強制能效標籤及MEPS星級合規、MMA製冷劑和消耗臭氧層物質許可義務（R-22逐步淘汰），以及按NCh/IEC 60335-2-40重新測試或調整文件，是中國空氣源熱泵進入智利的主要合規差距。電網兼容性極佳——智利採用220 V 50 Hz，與中國相同。CCC不被智利當局認可。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag. human_reviewed must remain false until a named qualified reviewer confirms all rows.
